case_title: RENEE TAYLOR VS. GELIN PORTILLO VELIZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-15-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100065056)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-15-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-05-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-24-2018 CONTINUED TO DEC-05-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
